payload.answer: Extracted durable decisions: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Preserved unresolved questions about Telegram and model selection as open questions.
citations: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
Open questions: Should Telegram be added later? Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?
payload.decision: Commit durable architectural decisions; preserve open questions as unresolved and do not treat them as decided.

entity_resolution.reason: No existing entity identifiers were provided; extracted entities are named as stated in the source.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain personal memory system.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection of Brain DB, not the source of truth.
Slack should function as a strict memory intake agent for Brain.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later as part of the Brain architecture.
It is unresolved which model is cheapest while still saturating performance for the Brain architecture.

details: Recorded two open questions without treating them as decisions.
No conflicts or superseded facts were detected in the provided summary.
